calls.query: const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '1,260p' AGENTS.md && sed -n '1,320p' .github/prompts/predict.md","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '1,280p' schemas/prediction.schema.json && sed -n '1,240p' schemas/agent_tooling.schema.json && sed -n '1,240p' schemas/agent_flags.schema.json && uv run fedcourts paths --court scotus --docket 73274796 --event evt-petition-disposition","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts paths --court scotus --docket 73274796 --event evt-petition-disposition && rg --files data/cases/scotus/73274796 | sort","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"find . -path '*/record/*' -o -name context.json -o -name documents.json | sort | sed -n '1,240p'; find /tmp -maxdepth 4 -type f \\( -name context.json -o -name documents.json -o -name snapshot.json \\) 2>/dev/null | sort | sed -n '1,240p'; sed -n '1,240p' data/cases/scotus/73274796/events/evt-petition-disposition/event.yaml; env | rg '^(COURT_ID|DOCKET_ID|EVENT_ID|PREDICTOR_ID|RUN_ID|MODEL_ID|DECIDED_BEFORE|FEDCOURTS|RECORD|CELL)' | sort","workdir":"/home
